overview: MihonBot is a manga/manhwa/comics companion dashboard with a live WhatsApp bot powered by Twilio. Users can manage their watchlist, track chapters, browse trending titles, and get AI recommendations — all from the web or directly via WhatsApp commands and free-form questions.
features: WhatsApp bot via Twilio Sandbox — chat with commands or free-form questions
Free-form AI answers powered by the recommendations agent
Chat history log in the bot commands dashboard
Twilio signature validation for secure webhook processing
Watchlist management, chapter tracking, and Discover page
